summary: Iteration 2 testing complete. All NEW backend endpoints (GET /api/reading/{id}, POST /api/whatsapp/subscribe, POST /api/notify) and NEW frontend flows (shareable /reading/:id page, WhatsApp opt-in, Pricing notify-me) work end-to-end. 11/11 new backend tests PASS. Frontend share page renders all 8 sections, share buttons (copy, whatsapp, PDF) wired correctly. Landing page WhatsApp + Pricing forms successfully submit and trigger success toast/inline state. ReadingModal step1→step2 navigation still works. As noted by main agent, /api/reading POST still 502s due to exhausted EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget (pre-existing, not a new bug).

minor.issue: Pre-existing from iter1: 502 'Budget has been exceeded' from EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Not retested. Reading creation path remains blocked until key is topped up.

issues: Premium dark/gold visual is consistent with rest of landing. Pricing card success state (inline green check + waitlist text) is clear and on-brand. No contrast or overflow issues observed.

action_items: (Carry-over from iter1) Refresh / top-up EMERGENT_LLM_KEY so POST /api/reading produces real readings instead of 502. Without this, the share/PDF flow can only be exercised on the seeded demo-reading-001 doc.

(Optional / nice-to-have) WhatsApp section currently only validates phone length client-side as >= 10 digits via .replace(/\D/g, '').length, but backend min_length is 8. They behave consistently for India-format numbers; consider aligning by tightening backend to 10 if Indian-only is the target.
(Optional) ReadingPage.jsx error CTA button reads 'Get your own reading' while the success-card variant reads 'Get my free reading' — minor copy inconsistency, easy unify.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/reading/{id}: correctly excludes mongo _id via projection {_id:0, request:0}. Good.
server.py /api/whatsapp/subscribe: digit-count validation (>=8) after stripping non-digits is correct; upsert by phone is idempotent. Solid.
server.py /api/notify: idempotent upsert on (email, product) pair. Email validation is minimal (checks for '@' and '.') — acceptable for MVP, but could be tightened with EmailStr.
ReadingView.jsx is correctly extracted as a pure component and used in both the modal result and the share page (DRY). Wraps content in id='reading-pdf-target' as required for PDF capture.
WhatsAppOptIn.jsx: nice loading + done states; toast fires on success. Inline `done` flag prevents duplicate submits.
Pricing.jsx: similar pattern, inline success message + toast; clean.
ReadingPage.jsx error CTA text says 'Get your own reading' (line 88) while reading-loaded CTA says 'Get my free reading' (line 136) — minor copy inconsistency.
server.py: app file ~310 lines but still focused. No size concerns yet.

success_rate.backend: 100% on iteration-2 endpoints (11/11). /api/reading POST remains blocked by LLM key budget (pre-existing).
success_rate.frontend: 100% on iteration-2 flows (share page, 404, WhatsApp opt-in, Pricing notify, modal step1->step2).

test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Created via tests: db.whatsapp_subs entry for phone=9876543210 (TEST Ananya / TEST Ananya2 / TEST WA User via upsert); db.notify_list entries for TEST_notify@example.com, TEST_idem@example.com, TEST_default_product@example.com, TEST_pricing_ui@example.com. All TEST_-prefixed and safe to purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features verified. Use /app/backend/tests/test_iteration2.py and /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py together for regression. POST /api/reading will continue to 502 until EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget is refreshed; do not interpret as a new bug. Seed doc id='demo-reading-001' (Ananya / Pisces) is the canonical share-page test target — do not delete from db.readings.
rca of the issue: No new issues found. Only carry-over: EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget exceeded → /api/reading POST returns 502. Mitigation: rotate / top-up the key in /app/backend/.env.
